chain.thought: Explanation: Considering only the USL W-League Western Division 1 seasons (2004–2013), the team finished outside the top 5 in the following years: 2004 (8th), 2005 (6th), 2008 (6th), 2009 (7th), 2010 (6th), and 2011 (7th). This totals 6 times.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
We consider only Division 1 (USL W-League, Western Division) seasons (2004–2013). Finishes outside the top 5 are positions 6th or worse.
- 2004: 8th (outside)  
- 2005: 6th (outside)  
- 2006: 5th (top 5)  
- 2007: 5th (top 5)  
- 2008: 6th (outside)  
- 2009: 7th (outside)  
- 2010: 6th (outside)  
- 2011: 7th (outside)  
- 2012: 4th (top 5)  
- 2013: 4th (top 5)

Total seasons outside top 5 in Division 1: 6.
